response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior engineer with deep open-source involvement, broad full-stack and systems experience, and a track record of teaching and community work, which fits the technical and open-source spirit of the role. However, he fails the explicit minimum German C1 requirement (resume states Basic), which is critical for a client-facing consulting leadership position, and his career is almost entirely individual-contributor work with no demonstrated team leadership, project management, or executive-level responsibility. UML, security/compliance, and Python exposure are also absent from the resume.
strengths: Extensive, varied engineering experience (Stripe, Shopify, embedded to web) with strong open-source and Linux background
Founder and long-term maintainer of an open-source geo-data platform, plus conference talks and multi-day courses showing mentoring ability
Berlin-based with fluent English and experience advising and building across many domains and tech stacks
concerns: German listed as Basic, well below the required C1 minimum for a German client-advisory role
No formal leadership, people-management, or technical project management roles despite this being a Head of Development position
No evidence of UML/modeling, IT security/risk/compliance expertise, or Python, all named in the job requirements

key_factors.factor: Leadership and project management track record
